    """
    path = []
    queue = [start]
    while queue:
        node = queue.pop(0)
        if node == end:
            break
        else:
            neighbors = graph[node]
            for neighbor in neighbors:
                if neighbor == start:
                    break
                else:
                    path.append(neighbor)
                    queue.append(neighbor)
                    return path
    return start

    Returns:

    path.append(start)
    current = start
    while current != end:
        for next in graph[current]:
            if next[1] == end:
                break
            path.append(next[0])
            current = next[0]
        path = path[::-1]
        return path
